text: North@CreaoAI profile: INTJ, Head of Community @CreaoAI, 2021 CS Bachelor with AI focus at @UofT, crypto trader, ex technical specialist @AlibabaGroup, Web3 innovator. Profile context: AI & Blockchain, discord.gg/creao-ai.

Pinned self-introduction: moved to Canada alone at 14, studied CS with AI focus at University of Toronto, joined AliExpress after graduation as backend developer for cross-border payments, moved to a Web3 startup in 2022, progressed from backend developer to technical lead and project operator.

Long post predicts that in the second half of 2026, agent engineering exploration will extend from AGI to WMI, World-Modeling Intelligence. He describes 2024 AI apps as workflow-heavy, says Manus unified the route toward agent engineering, names context engineering, harnesses, and skills as extensions, and says AGI solves execution friction while WMI adds dynamic world modeling, continuous sensing, identity, long-term goals, and autonomous action. He says 2027 may open the WMI era and plans to post a CREAO WMI white paper.

Post argues that after computing became widespread, enterprise digitalization formed a labor paradigm commonly called white collar work, and more precisely, all white-collar workers are information workers. The visible text connects this to AI-era labor transformation.
Personal travel/food post from Yunnan about trying stir-fried jianshouqing and understanding why locals eat it despite hallucination risk.

Codex workflow post: he bought the $100 Codex subscription trial and expects long-term use. Current subscriptions: Claude $20, Cursor $200, Gemini cancelled. Development workflow: use Cursor Opus 4.7 to clarify product requirements and generate full technical plan, then hand the document to Codex to implement code. He says Cursor Opus 4.7 is strong for complex planning, Codex extra high has high execution value for coding, Cursor Opus 4.7 remains better for local personal knowledge-base management and complex knowledge structure, and ChatGPT Pro is used for tweet polishing because it is more stable in rhythm and expression.

Follower milestone post: account reached 5,000 followers after nearly two months and targets 10,000 after another two months. Quoted March post says 2,000 followers included 522 verified accounts, around 25 percent, with low general traffic because low-frequency high-quality content creates a gap between verified-follower density and daily impressions.
